name: PASSIVE_BARBED_NAME
desc_en: Your hook deals +1 damage and inflicts Bleed.

name: PASSIVE_BOWLINGBALL_NAME
desc_en: Adjacent and diagonal allied cats get the bonus ability Bowl.

name: PASSIVE_CONFRONTATIONAL_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, trample one tile towards the source of damage.

name: PASSIVE_DUKEOFFLIES_NAME
desc_en:
At the end of the battle, all food pickups become allied flies.
Allied flies stay with you between battles.

name: PASSIVE_FRESHMEAT_NAME
desc_en: When you eat food, gain +1 [img:str].

name: PASSIVE_GLUTTON_NAME
desc_en: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it.

name: PASSIVE_GRAPPLINGHOOK_NAME
desc_en: Your hook pulls you toward knockback-immune objects.

name: PASSIVE_GURGITATOR_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you heal over your max HP, gain +1 [img:str].

name: PASSIVE_HACK_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack is always critical against enemies with [img:shield].
Your basic attack's critical hits remove buffs from units.

name: PASSIVE_HARPOONER_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy moves in range, hook it.

name: PASSIVE_HEAVEHOOK_NAME
desc_en:
Your hook can target tiles.
Units pulled by your hook gain trample while being hooked.

name: PASSIVE_HOOKED_NAME
desc_en: You can use your hook 2 additional times on your turn.

name: PASSIVE_INCUBATOR_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you heal over your max HP, spawn a rot fly.

name: PASSIVE_INDIGESTION_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you heal over your max HP, fart and inflict Poison 3 on adjacent units.

name: PASSIVE_LOOSEMEAT_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, spawn a food pickup.

name: PASSIVE_LORDOFTHEFLIES_NAME
desc_en:
All flies are Charmed and get +1 Damage.
Whenever you inflict Rot, you inflict +1 Rot.

name: PASSIVE_MAINCOURSE_NAME
desc_en: Food and scrap pickups you spawn are bigger.

name: PASSIVE_MASOCHIST_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, gain +1 [img:str], [img:con], or [img:spd] at random.

name: PASSIVE_NEVERFULL_NAME
desc_en:
You can heal over your max HP.
Excess HP is lost between battles.

name: PASSIVE_PAINGAIN_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, gain +2 Temp Damage.

name: PASSIVE_PUTREFY_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Rot 1.

name: PASSIVE_SCHADENFREUDE_NAME
desc_en: Your [img:str] and [img:con] are increased by 2 for each disorder your party has.

name: PASSIVE_STOMPY_NAME
desc_en:
You have Trample.
Trample damage you deal has Cleave.

name: PASSIVE_TESTY_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, gain +1 movement range until the end of your turn.

name: PASSIVE_WIDESWING_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack is a 3x3 tile spin attack with Cleave.

name: PASSIVE_AMPED_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 [img:spd] at the end of your turn.

name: PASSIVE_AMPLIFY_NAME
desc_en: +1 Magic Damage.

name: PASSIVE_ANIMALHANDLER_NAME
desc_en: You start each battle with a random vermin familiar with boosted damage and health.

name: PASSIVE_BAREMINIMUM_NAME
desc_en: Your stats can't go below 5.

name: PASSIVE_BLOODBLOODED_NAME
desc_en: Bleed you inflict is increased by 1.

name: PASSIVE_BUTCHERSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Butcher abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_CAREFUL_NAME
desc_en: Damage you deal to other allies is reduced to 0.

name: PASSIVE_CHARMING_NAME
desc_en: You have a 25% chance to inflict Charm on units that damage you.

name: PASSIVE_CLERICSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Cleric abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_DAUNT_NAME
desc_en: Small enemies won't attack you.

name: PASSIVE_DEALER_NAME
desc_en: You can use consumables on other units.

name: PASSIVE_DEATHBOON_NAME
desc_en: When you're downed, all allies gain All Stats Up.

name: PASSIVE_DEATHPROOF_NAME
desc_en: While downed, you have a 25% chance to revive with 1 HP at the end of each round.

name: PASSIVE_DEATHLESS_NAME
desc_en: +3 Corpse HP

name: PASSIVE_DEATHSDOOR_NAME
desc_en: While you're at 1 HP, your spells cost 1 mana, but can only be cast once per turn.

name: PASSIVE_DIRTYCLAWS_NAME
desc_en: Your physical attacks on Poisoned or Bleeding enemies inflict +1 Poison and/or Bleed.

name: PASSIVE_DRUIDSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Druid abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_ETANK_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle with +20 unfilled max health.

name: PASSIVE_FASTFOOTED_NAME
desc_en: You are immune to negative tile effects.

name: PASSIVE_FIGHTERSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Fighter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_FIRSTIMPRESSION_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle with +1 Bonus Attack.

name: PASSIVE_FURIOUS_NAME
desc_en:
Gain +1 Damage each time you land a critical hit.
+5% critical hit chance.

name: PASSIVE_GASSY_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you take damage, knock back all adjacent units.

name: PASSIVE_HOTBLOODED_NAME
desc_en: Burn you inflict is increased by 1.

name: PASSIVE_HUNTERSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Hunter abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_INFESTED_NAME
desc_en: 50% chance to spawn a flea familiar when you end your turn.

name: PASSIVE_JESTERSSOUL_NAME
desc_en:
Abilities from any class are offered when you level up.
You can reroll your level up options twice.

name: PASSIVE_LATEBLOOMER_NAME
desc_en: On your 5th turn, you gain All Stats Up 3.

name: PASSIVE_LEADER_NAME
desc_en: Adjacent allies have +1 Damage and +1 Range.

name: PASSIVE_LONGSHOT_NAME
desc_en: +1 Range.

name: PASSIVE_LUCKDRAIN_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever a unit is downed.

name: PASSIVE_LUCKY_NAME
desc_en: PASSIVE_LUCKY_DESC

name: PASSIVE_MAGESOUL_NAME
desc_en: Mage abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_MANGE_NAME
desc_en: Inflict Poison 1 on units that contact you.

name: PASSIVE_MANIA_NAME
desc_en: 10% chance to restore all your mana at the start of your turn.

name: PASSIVE_METALDETECTOR_NAME
desc_en: 5% chance to spawn a coin when you move over a tile.

name: PASSIVE_MINIME_NAME
desc_en: Gain a half-sized copy of yourself that has 50% of your stats. The copy is AI controlled.

name: PASSIVE_MONKSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Monk abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_NATURALHEALING_NAME
desc_en: You have +1 Health Regeneration

name: PASSIVE_NECROMANCERSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Necromancer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_180_NAME
desc_en: When you use your basic attack, turn around and use it again.

name: PASSIVE_OVERCONFIDENT_NAME
desc_en: While at full HP, reduce the cost of your spells by 2, but take double damage. This can't reduce mana costs to less than 1.

name: PASSIVE_PATIENCE_NAME
desc_en: If you end your turn without taking any actions, gain an extra turn at the end of the round. You don't regenerate mana on your main turn if you pass it.

name: PASSIVE_PRESSUREPOINTS_NAME
desc_en: Damage you deal that's 2 or less is always critical.

name: PASSIVE_PROTECTION_NAME
desc_en: PASSIVE_PROTECTION_DESC

name: PASSIVE_PSYCHICSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Psychic abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_PULP_NAME
desc_en: When you kill a unit or destroy a corpse, it becomes meat.

name: PASSIVE_ROCKIN_NAME
desc_en: Spawn 4 small rocks at the start of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_SANTASANGRE_NAME
desc_en: When you're downed, allies heal 12 HP. Excess healing is converted to Shield.

name: PASSIVE_SCAVENGER_NAME
desc_en: If your trinket slot is empty, equip a small consumable food item at the start of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_SELFASSURED_NAME
desc_en: Gain a random stat up whenever you down a unit.

name: PASSIVE_SERIALKILLER_NAME
desc_en: After you kill 3 units, gain +6 [img:spd] and backstabs have 100% crit chance.

name: PASSIVE_SKILLSHARE_NAME
desc_en: Your other passive ability is shared with the other cats in your party at the start of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_SLUGGER_NAME
desc_en: +1 Damage.

name: PASSIVE_STRENGTHINNUMBERS_NAME
desc_en: Your familiars have +1 Damage for each other familiar you have.

name: PASSIVE_STUDY_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 [img:int] whenever you hit a new type of unit with an attack or ability.

name: PASSIVE_TANKSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Tank abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_THIEFSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Thief abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_TINKERERSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Tinkerer abilities are offered when you level up.

name: PASSIVE_TOXICBLOODED_NAME
desc_en: Poison you inflict is increased by 1.

name: PASSIVE_UNRESTRICTED_NAME
desc_en: Actions with a once per battle restriction can be cast once per turn instead.

name: PASSIVE_UNSCARRED_NAME
desc_en: While at full hp you have 100% critical hit chance.

name: PASSIVE_VOIDSOUL_NAME
desc_en: Only upgraded Collarless abilities are offered when you level up

name: PASSIVE_WHIPCRACKER_NAME
desc_en: When you damage an ally they gain +1 Damage.

name: PASSIVE_WIGGLY_NAME
desc_en: +25% dodge chance.

name: PASSIVE_WORMS_NAME
desc_en: 50% chance to spawn a maggot familiar when you end your turn.

name: PASSIVE_ZENKAIBOOST_NAME
desc_en: If you end battle with 1 HP, gain +1 to a random stat permanently and start the next battle at full HP with All Stats Up 3.

name: DISORDER_ADHD_NAME
desc_en: You have 5 seconds to make decisions, or else this cat acts on its own.

name: DISORDER_ASRFIGHT_NAME
desc_en: Gain +6 [img:str] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

name: DISORDER_ASRFLIGHT_NAME
desc_en: Gain +6 [img:spd] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

name: DISORDER_ACIDREFLUX_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack becomes a lobbed shot with splash damage but deals 2 damage to you.

name: DISORDER_ALBINISM_NAME
desc_en:
Fire damage you take inflicts +3 Burn.
Your basic attack has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.

name: DISORDER_ANEMIA_NAME
desc_en:
When you take damage, you have a 10% chance to gain Bleed 1.
Gain 2 Charge for each damage you take from Bleed.

name: DISORDER_ANXIETY_NAME
desc_en: +10% Dodge chance. When you take damage, run away from the source.

name: DISORDER_AUTISM_NAME
desc_en: Spells you were born with cost -2 mana. Other spells cost +1 mana.

name: DISORDER_BIPOLARDISORDER_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with either
 +5 [img:int], +5 [img:cha], and +5 [img:spd]
or 
All Stats Down 2.

name: DISORDER_BIRDFLU_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle in Mockingbird Form.
You have a 20% chance to recover at the end of each battle.
Contagious.

name: DISORDER_BLACKFETIN_NAME
desc_en:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When an ally cat is downed, restore all your mana.

name: DISORDER_BLESSINGOFGLORG_NAME
desc_en: You can unequip cursed items.

name: DISORDER_BLOODFRENZY_NAME
desc_en: When you kill a unit, take an extra turn with Madness.

name: DISORDER_BOILS_NAME
desc_en:
+1 Brace.
You spawn a puddle of creep whenever you get hit. You can't equip face armor.

name: DISORDER_BORROWEDTIME_NAME
desc_en: +50% dodge chance. Doomed 3.

name: DISORDER_BRAINDAMAGE_NAME
desc_en: You can't use item actions. +2 Brace.

name: DISORDER_BRAINDEAD_NAME
desc_en: Gain twice as many stats when you level up. +1 Reroll when leveling up.

name: DISORDER_BRAVE_NAME
desc_en:
Take your turn earlier.
Immune to Fear and Madness.
Attacks against you never miss.

name: DISORDER_BROKENLIMB_NAME
desc_en: You can't equip trinkets or consumables. +2 Thorns.

name: DISORDER_CANCER_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each battle, lose 3 random stats permanently and gain a random mutation.

name: DISORDER_NECROPHAGE_NAME
desc_en: At the start of your turn, if there's a dead body near you, move towards it and eat it to gain All Stats Up and heal 4 HP.

name: DISORDER_CHARRED_NAME
desc_en: Bruise 1. You cannot be Burned.

name: DISORDER_CHUNGUS_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_CHUNGUS_DESC

name: DISORDER_COMMONCOLD_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle with All Stats Down. 30% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: DISORDER_COVID_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with All Stats Down, Poison 1, and Weakness 1.
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1 and Weakness 1.
15% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: DISORDER_CROHNSDISEASE_NAME
desc_en: At the end of your turn, you have a 20% chance to poop all over the place!

name: DISORDER_DARKONE_NAME
desc_en: At end of your turn, deal 1 damage to all units and heal for the damage dealt. Whenever you down an ally gain All Stats Up.

name: DISORDER_DECLAWED_NAME
desc_en: You can't equip weapons.

name: DISORDER_DEEPCUT_NAME
desc_en:
Bleed 1.
You can't equip trinkets or consumables. 
Bonus ability: Bloodzerk.

name: DISORDER_DEPRESSION_NAME
desc_en: Adjacent units get All Stats Down 2.

name: DISORDER_DIABETES_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn, if you haven't eaten food, gain All Stats Down and Confusion 1. Each time you eat food, cleanse all your debuffs and gain +1 [img:int].

name: DISORDER_DISTEMPER_NAME
desc_en:
At the end of each battle gain +10% crit chance, +25% crit damage, and +5% miss chance. Permanently.
You can't equip face armor.

name: DISORDER_DOWNSSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_DOWNSSYNDROME_DESC

name: DISORDER_DWARFISM_NAME
desc_en: +10% dodge chance.

name: DISORDER_DYSENTERY_NAME
desc_en: 50% chance to make a burning poop directly behind you when you end your turn.

name: DISORDER_DYSKINESIA_NAME
desc_en: When you end your movement, knockback all adjacent units 1 tile.

name: DISORDER_DYSLEXIA_NAME
desc_en: Swap 3's and 5's in the mana costs and damage values of your spells while in a battle. 6's and 9's are also swapped.

name: DISORDER_EATINGDISORDER_NAME
desc_en: Double the effects of your consumables but you are confused on how to eat them.

name: DISORDER_EBOLA_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with Bleed 3. Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 2.
5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: DISORDER_ELEPHANTIASIS_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each battle, gain -1 [img:spd] and +2 starting [img:shield] permanently. After 8 battles, gain Trample.

name: DISORDER_EMPATH_NAME
desc_en:
Take 1 damage when you deal damage.
Your heals heal for 1 extra.

name: DISORDER_ETERNALYOUTH_NAME
desc_en:
You are a kitten... forever!
+1 [img:comfort], +1 [img:stimulation], +1 [img:appeal]

name: DISORDER_BADGAS_NAME
desc_en: On the first round, take your turn last. At the start of that turn, do a Mega Fart attack that inflicts Poison 2.

name: DISORDER_FATTYLIVER_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you lose HP, you permanently lose 1 [img:con].

name: DISORDER_FELINEAIDS_NAME

Your basic attack inflicts Poison 3 and Weakness 1.
Inflict Poison 3 and Weakness 1 on units that contact you.
Gain -1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd] at the end of each battle permanently.

name: DISORDER_FIDGETY_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn, automatically use your weapon on a random unit in range, for free.

name: DISORDER_FLAMINGFISTS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attacks inflict Burn 1. Start with Burn 1.

name: DISORDER_THEFLU_NAME

Start each battle with Slow 5 and Weakness 5.
Your basic attack inflicts Slow 1 and Weakness 1.
20% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: DISORDER_FOSSILIZED_NAME
desc_en: +2 Brace. Slide like a rock whenever you get hit.

name: DISORDER_ZOOMIES_NAME
desc_en: Your movement action is a dash attack.

name: DISORDER_GAMBLINGADDICT_NAME
desc_en:
+33% miss chance.
100% critical hit chance.

name: DISORDER_GARGANTUAN_NAME
desc_en: You are permanently immobile.

name: DISORDER_GASTRITIS_NAME
desc_en: At the end of your turn, fart and Poison all adjacent units.

name: DISORDER_GIGACHAD_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_GIGACHAD_DESC

name: DISORDER_GIGANTISM_NAME
desc_en: Trample.

name: DISORDER_OSTEOGENESISIMPERFECTA_NAME
desc_en:
+2 Bruise, +2 Bleed Thorns, and +2 Thorns.
When you're downed, you get injured an extra time.

name: DISORDER_HEADTRAUMA_NAME
desc_en: You can't equip head armor. Your Collarless spells cost -2 mana.

name: DISORDER_HYPERSOMNIA_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle asleep and with full health.

name: DISORDER_HYPOMANIA_NAME

name: DISORDER_IBS_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, poop.

name: DISORDER_IMPOSTERSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: You're quite suspicious…

name: DISORDER_INCONTINENCE_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, pee yourself.

name: DISORDER_INFESTATION_NAME

name: DISORDER_INSOMNIA_NAME

You can't fall asleep.

name: DISORDER_INTESTINALRPOLAPSE_NAME

name: DISORDER_IMMORTAL_NAME
desc_en:
All damage you take is reduced to 1.

name: DISORDER_KAMIKAZE_NAME

name: DISORDER_KIDNEYSTONE_NAME

name: DISORDER_LEPROSY_NAME

name: DISORDER_LYCANTHROPY_NAME

name: DISORDER_NARCOLEPSY_NAME

name: DISORDER_NECROSIS_NAME

name: DISORDER_NUDIST_NAME
desc_en:
+50% dodge chance.

name: DISORDER_OCD_NAME
desc_en:
Bonus Ability: Groom
At the end of your turn, if you didn't use Groom, take 2 damage.

name: DISORDER_ORANGEFETIN_NAME
desc_en:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When you kill an enemy, gain 3 mana and heal 2 hp.

name: DISORDER_PTSD_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, gain Fear and +2 Damage.

name: DISORDER_PACIFIST_NAME

name: DISORDER_PARAPELEGIC_NAME
desc_en:
The range of all your movement, dash, and jump abilities are capped at 1 unless they teleport.
Enemies won't prioritize attacking you.

name: DISORDER_PARANOIA_NAME
desc_en: When a unit ends its movement directly behind you, attack it and gain Fear.

name: DISORDER_PHONY_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with full mana.

name: DISORDER_PICA_NAME
desc_en: When you collect a coin or scrap pickup, heal instead of gaining the pickup's normal effect.

name: DISORDER_PILLPOPPER_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with All Stats Down 2.
Gain All Stats Up 3 whenever you eat a pill.

name: DISORDER_POX_NAME
desc_en: 10% chance to skip your turn to scratch yourself. Your basic attack has a 50% chance to inflict Poison 1. 5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

name: DISORDER_THESHINING_NAME
desc_en:
Your attacks can't miss.
+15% dodge chance and +15% chance to gain Fear at the start of each turn.

name: DISORDER_PRIMORDIALDWARF_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_PRIMORDIALDWARF_DESC

name: DISORDER_PSYCHOSIS_NAME
desc_en: After your first turn, you have permanent madness.

name: DISORDER_PUNCTUREDEYE_NAME
desc_en:
+10% miss chance.
You can't equip face armor. Gain an eyeball trinket.

name: DISORDER_PURPLEFETIN_NAME
desc_en:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
You can reroll your level up options 3 times.

name: DISORDER_RABIES_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack is a melee attack. You can't equip face armor.
After each battle, gain +2 [img:str] and -1 [img:int].
If your [img:int] is 0 or less, you have Madness.

name: DISORDER_SAVANTSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_SAVANTSYNDROME_DESC

name: DISORDER_SCALYSCABS_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_SCALYSCABS_DESC

name: DISORDER_SCATOLOGICAL_NAME
desc_en:
Heal 5 HP when you damage poop.
At the start of your turn, if you're near poop, you automatically move toward it and eat it.

name: DISORDER_SCHIZOPHRENIA_NAME
desc_en: At the end of your turn, spawn a hallucination. It has Madness, attacks any unit except you, and fades after its turn.

name: DISORDER_SCHRODINGERDISORDER_NAME
desc_en: 50% chance to start each battle dead, or alive with max hp and All Stats Up 2 and an extra turn at the start of the battle.

name: DISORDER_SCLERODERMA_NAME
desc_en: At the start of each battle, you lose all but 1 HP, but gain that much [img:shield].

name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: All but your face slot is locked. Your face item's effects are tripled!

name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: All but your head slot is locked. Your head item's effects are tripled!

name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: All but your neck slot is locked. Your neck item's effects are tripled!

name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: All but your trinket slot is locked. Your trinket's effects are tripled!

name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: All but your weapon slot is locked. Your weapon's effects are tripled!

name: DISORDER_SEVEREDTHUMB_NAME
desc_en: You can't equip weapons. Spawn a Food pickup at the start of each battle.

name: DISORDER_SHUNNED_NAME
desc_en:
Take your turn last.

name: DISORDER_SINGLETON_NAME
desc_en:
Your max HP and mana are reduced to 1.
Damage you take is reduced to 1.
Your spells cost 1 mana.

name: DISORDER_SKILLSHAREDISORDER_NAME
desc_en: If you have a 2nd disorder, all other cats in your party gain it at the start of each battle.

name: DISORDER_SLEEPPARALYSIS_NAME
desc_en:
When you fall asleep, a Sleep Paralysis Demon with Madness spawns! You can't wake up until it's killed.
Learn the spell Rest (if you have a free spell slot).

name: DISORDER_SOCIOPATHY_NAME
desc_en: You have Madness on your first turn.

name: DISORDER_SOULLESS_NAME
desc_en: You are immune to buffs and debuffs. When you die, you don't leave a corpse.

name: DISORDER_SPINABIFIDA_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_SPINABIFIDA_DESC

name: DISORDER_SPONTANEOUSCOMBUSTION_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage from an ability, you have a 15% chance to inflict Burn 5 on yourself and adjacent units.

name: DISORDER_STINKY_NAME
desc_en: Adjacent units move away from you at the start of their turns.

name: DISORDER_STOCKHOLMSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you take damage, move toward the source.

name: DISORDER_TACHYSENSIA_NAME
desc_en: DISORDER_TACHYSENSIA_DESC

name: DISORDER_TAMPEREDGENES_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each battle gain a random mutation. When you're downed, your corpse is destroyed.

name: DISORDER_THEHUNGER_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack has lifesteal.
If you don't deal damage to a unit on your turn, gain Madness 1.

name: DISORDER_TOUCHED_NAME
desc_en: You can no longer heal HP.

name: DISORDER_TOURETTES_NAME
desc_en: At the start of your turn, you have a 33% chance to cast one of your spells at a random target for free.

name: DISORDER_TOXOPLASMOSIS_NAME

name: DISORDER_TRAUMATOPHOBIA_NAME
desc_en: Whenever you take damage, move 1 tile away from the source.

name: DISORDER_TRISKAIDEKAPHOBIA_NAME

name: DISORDER_VEGAN_NAME
desc_en: You don't eat meat.

name: DISORDER_VIOLENTOUTBURSTS_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn, dash forward 2 tiles, attack with Knockback, and take 1 damage.

name: DISORDER_WILLIAMSSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: Your attacks may Charm.

name: DISORDER_WOBBLYCATSYNDROME_NAME
desc_en: 25% chance to block attacks and get knocked back 10 tiles instead.

name: DISORDER_WRENCHEDNECK_NAME
desc_en: You can't equip neck armor. Double the effects of your head armor.

name: PASSIVE_ANIMALISTIC_NAME
desc_en:
Familiars you spawn gain +2 Damage.
When you shapeshift, gain +1 Damage.

name: PASSIVE_BARKSKIN_NAME
desc_en:
+1 Brace.
When you take damage, you get +1 temporary Brace until the start of your next turn.

name: PASSIVE_BOUQUET_NAME
desc_en: Spawn a tall flower tile under you at the end of your turn.

name: PASSIVE_BUDDYSYSTEM_NAME
desc_en: When you lose [img:divineshield], your crow gains +1 [img:divineshield]. When your crow loses [img:divineshield], gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: PASSIVE_EMPTYVESSEL_NAME
desc_en: Familiars you spawn have +3 Health Regeneration and +10 max health.

name: PASSIVE_ENCORE_NAME
desc_en: When you use a musical ability, refresh your basic action.

name: PASSIVE_FERAL_NAME
desc_en: Your bonus ability is Feral Attack.

name: PASSIVE_FLOWERPOWER_NAME
desc_en: Units on flower tiles have +2 [img:str] and +2 Brace. When you move, plant flowers on the tile you moved from.

name: PASSIVE_GOODVIBRATIONS_NAME
desc_en: Allies have +1 Health Regeneration and +1 Mana Regeneration.

name: PASSIVE_LIKEAFISH_NAME
desc_en:
Water tiles don't slow you down.
Gain +1 Holy Shield at the end of the turn if you're wet and have no Holy Shield.
Familiars you spawn also have this passive.

name: PASSIVE_MAESTRO_NAME
desc_en: Your musical spells cost 50% less mana.

name: PASSIVE_MEGAMINIONS_NAME
desc_en: Every 3rd familiar you spawn is upgraded into a Champion.

name: PASSIVE_NATUREGUIDANCE_NAME
desc_en: Allied familiars are immune to damage from tiles, knockback, thorns, and trample.

name: PASSIVE_PATHFINDER_NAME
desc_en: Grass tiles are free to move through for you and familiars you spawn. Plant grass as you walk.

name: PASSIVE_POISONIVY_NAME
desc_en: You and familiar you spawn are Poisonous.

name: PASSIVE_RAPGOD_NAME
desc_en: Your basic action also gives temporary +4 [img:spd].

name: PASSIVE_SNEAKATTACK_NAME
desc_en:
Your spells that spawn familiars cost -3 mana.
Familiars spawned by your spells gain +2 Damage and +2 Movement, but die after their first turn.

name: PASSIVE_LOVESONG_NAME
desc_en: Your basic action has +2 area, and heals 1 additional HP.

name: PASSIVE_SUPERFRIENDS_NAME
desc_en: Familiars spawned by spells gain All Stats Up 2, but that spell gets disabled until the spawned familiars die.

name: PASSIVE_SUICIDESQUAD_NAME
desc_en: Your controllable familiars gain Self Destruct as their bonus ability.

name: PASSIVE_SUPERCROW_NAME
desc_en: Your crow has its abilities upgraded.

name: PASSIVE_TEAMWORK_NAME
desc_en: When one of your familiars kills something, all allies get +1 Damage.

name: PASSIVE_VERSATILEVOLCALIST_NAME
desc_en: Your basic action deals 1 damage to enemies, and inflicts temporary -1 Damage. Your basic attack wont apply debuffs to allies or buffs to enemies.

name: PASSIVE_WILDANIMALS_NAME
desc_en: Familiars you spawn attack a random enemy within their range when they are spawned.

name: PASSIVE_WILDSTYLE_NAME
desc_en: The first time you shapeshift each turn, gain an extra turn.

name: PASSIVE_AVENGER_NAME
desc_en: When an allied cat is downed, gain All Stats Up 2 and heal 8.

name: PASSIVE_FRENZY_NAME
desc_en: When you down a unit, gain +2 [img:str].

name: PASSIVE_BONED_NAME
desc_en: When you kill a unit, if you don't have a weapon, gain a Bone Club.

name: PASSIVE_DUALWIELD_NAME
desc_en: When you use your weapon, automatically use it again for free.

name: PASSIVE_DUMBMUSCLE_NAME
desc_en:
Lose 1 [img:int] each time you take damage.
If you have 4 or less [img:int], gain +2 [img:str] and your basic attack inflicts Bruise. at 0 [img:int], gain +100% critical hit chance.

name: PASSIVE_HULKUP_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, gain +2 [img:spd].

name: PASSIVE_FIGHTME_NAME
desc_en: You have +2 [img:str] and +1 Brace for each enemy adjacent to you.

name: PASSIVE_HAMSTERSTYLE_NAME
desc_en:
+1 Health Regeneration.
Start with 2 Bonus Moves.

name: PASSIVE_MATHQ_NAME
desc_en: Your spells cost 3 mana to cast, but each can be cast only once per turn.

name: PASSIVE_HITME_NAME
desc_en:
When you take damage from an ally, basic attack in the direction you're facing.
Damage you take from allies is reduced to 1.

name: PASSIVE_FERVOR_NAME
desc_en: When you down a unit, you heal 5 HP.

name: PASSIVE_MOSTVALUABLECAT_NAME
desc_en:
When you or an ally downs another unit, they become the Alpha.
If you're the Alpha, take an extra turn at the end of each round.

name: PASSIVE_OVERPOWERED_NAME
desc_en: Excess damage you deal to units makes them explode, dealing the excess damage to units around it, except for you.

name: PASSIVE_PUNCHFACE_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attacks are critical if they hit the front of a unit.

name: PASSIVE_RATSTYLE_NAME
desc_en: +10% dodge chance.

name: PASSIVE_MERCILESS_NAME
desc_en:
When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield] and refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This doesn't trigger during your movement action.)[/s]

name: PASSIVE_PATELLARREFLEX_NAME
desc_en: When a unit damages you, counter-attack dealing 1 damage and inflicting Bruise.

name: PASSIVE_SCARS_NAME
desc_en: +1 Brace.

name: PASSIVE_SHOULDERCHECK_NAME
desc_en: If you're facing a unit after you move, automatically attack it at 33% damage.

name: PASSIVE_SKULLSMASH_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Bruise.

name: PASSIVE_SMASH_NAME
desc_en:
Your weapons deal triple damage, but they always break when you use them.
Three Sticks are added to your inventory.

name: PASSIVE_THICKSKULL_NAME
desc_en:
All injuries you get are Concussions.
You get +3 [img:shield] for each concussion you have. This caps at 30 [img:shield].

name: PASSIVE_TURTLESTYLE_NAME
desc_en: PASSIVE_TURTLESTYLE_DESC

name: PASSIVE_VENGEFUL_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack is always critical on enemies that have damaged you.

name: PASSIVE_WEAPONMASTER_NAME
desc_en: Your weapon and item abilities deal +2 Damage and get +25% critical chance. A pipe is added to your inventory.

name: PASSIVE_ANIMALCONTROL_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack causes units to immediately attack an enemy in range.

name: PASSIVE_BROODMOTHER_NAME
desc_en: Your familiars and units you charm gain +2 Damage and +5 HP.

name: PASSIVE_CATCHPROJECTILES_NAME
desc_en: 33% chance to block enemy projectiles and a 100% chance to block allied projectiles. If you block a projectile, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: PASSIVE_FLEABAG_NAME
desc_en: At the end of your turn, spawn Flea familiars equal to the number of enemies you've killed this battle.

name: PASSIVE_GRAVITYFALLS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals +1 damage for each tile you shoot beyond range 3.

name: PASSIVE_BULLSEYE_NAME
desc_en:
Your ranged attacks never miss.
+25% critical hit chance.

name: PASSIVE_HAZARDOUS_NAME
desc_en: Tile damage and effects are doubled.

name: PASSIVE_HOST_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle with 2 tiny spider familiars. A spider egg parasite is added to your inventory. You can unequip parasites freely.

name: PASSIVE_HUNTERSBOON_NAME
desc_en: The first time you kill a unit each turn, gain 5 mana.

name: PASSIVE_LUCKSWING_NAME
desc_en: +50% critical hit chance but +25% chance to miss.

name: PASSIVE_QUIVER_NAME
desc_en: Save unused basic attacks for future turns.

name: PASSIVE_RUBBERARROWS_NAME
desc_en: Your projectiles bounce to another enemy within 3 tiles.

name: PASSIVE_SLEEPDARTS_NAME
desc_en: At the start of each battle, you and all allies that don't have weapons gains a temporary Sleep Dart.

name: PASSIVE_SNIPER_NAME
desc_en: Critical hits deal +100% more damage and have a 25% chance to inflict Stun.

name: PASSIVE_SPLITSHOT_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack has +1 area but deals 50% less damage.

name: PASSIVE_SPOTTERS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack can target tiles adjacent to allies.

name: PASSIVE_SURVIVALIST_NAME
desc_en:
6 healing consumables and a full water bottle are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +2 food at the end of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_TAINTEDMOTHER_NAME
desc_en: Your familiars and units you charm gain +4 [img:spd] and inflict Poison and Bleed.

name: PASSIVE_TAKEAIM_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 range and damage at the start of each turn. You lose this when you move.

name: PASSIVE_TALKTOANIMALS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Charm 5 the first time you use it each battle.

name: PASSIVE_THORNARROWS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack spawns brambles.

name: PASSIVE_THRILLOFTHEHUNT_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each battle, if you killed at least 3 enemies, gain +1 [img:dex] permanently and find a random consumable item.

name: PASSIVE_TOWERDEFENSE_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy comes within range, shoot them for 1 damage.

name: PASSIVE_TRAPS_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack spawns a bear trap if you shoot an empty tile.
Whenever one of your traps triggers, gain +2 [img:dex].

name: PASSIVE_TRICKYTRAPS_NAME
desc_en: Damage and effects from your traps are doubled.

name: PASSIVE_GOOFBALL_NAME
desc_en: Take an extra turn at the start of each round.

name: PASSIVE_SUPERLUCK_NAME
desc_en: PASSIVE_SUPERLUCK_DESC

name: PASSIVE_BURNINGPAWS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic action inflicts Burn 2.

name: PASSIVE_CHARGEUP_NAME
desc_en: If you end your turn with 0 mana, the next spell you cast is free

name: PASSIVE_DEATHCHILL_NAME
desc_en: When downed, Freeze all enemies and the rest of the map.

name: PASSIVE_ELEMENTALATTUNEMENT_NAME
desc_en: Casting elemental spells imbues your basic attack with those elements and relevant effects for the rest of the battle.

name: PASSIVE_ENERGYSTORM_NAME
desc_en: Every 3rd spell you cast in a turn is cast twice.

name: PASSIVE_FIREASPECT_NAME
desc_en:
Fire immunity.
Inflict Burn 1 on units that contact you.
Your Fire element damage is increased by 1 and inflicts +1 Burn.

name: PASSIVE_FIVE_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana or HP, gain +5 [img:shield] and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes until the end of your next turn .

name: PASSIVE_FOUR_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn with exactly 4 mana or HP, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 Magic Damage.

name: PASSIVE_FORCEFIELD_NAME
desc_en: At the start of every third turn, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: PASSIVE_ICEASPECT_NAME
desc_en:
Ice immunity. You can damage frozen units.
Units that contact you take 1 Ice Damage, Slow 2, and have a 5% chance to Freeze.

name: PASSIVE_ICEPAWS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 2, and has a 20% chance to Freeze. You can damage frozen units.

name: PASSIVE_LATENTENERGY_NAME
desc_en: When an ally spends mana, Gain +2 Magic Damage until the next time you use magic.

name: PASSIVE_LEARNFROMME_NAME
desc_en: When you cast a spell, all allied cats gain that spell in their bonus slot.

name: PASSIVE_LIGHTUPTHESTAGE_NAME
desc_en: At the end of your turn, emit 2 Sparkles for each turn you've taken.

name: PASSIVE_LIGHTNINGASPECT_NAME
desc_en:
Electric immunity.
When you deal Electric Damage, gain +1 Charge.

name: PASSIVE_LIGHTNINGPAWS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals +2 Electric Damage and has a 15% chance to Stun.

name: PASSIVE_LONGCAST_NAME
desc_en: Tile-targeted spells gain +5 Range.

name: PASSIVE_MAGICGURU_NAME
desc_en: Your allies have +1 Mana Regeneration. When an ally spends 7+ mana to cast a spell, they gain All Stats Up.

name: PASSIVE_SYNTHESIZE_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 [img:int] at the start of each turn.

name: PASSIVE_ONE_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 1 spell, double cast your next spell.

name: PASSIVE_OVERLOAD_NAME
desc_en: When you cast a spell, deal 3 random elemental damage to adjacent tiles.

name: PASSIVE_PAWMISSILE_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack is Magic Missile.
(its damage scales with [img:int]).

name: PASSIVE_RECHARGED_NAME
desc_en:
+5 starting mana. +5 Mana Regeneration.
Lose all unspent mana at the end of each of your turns

name: PASSIVE_RESONANCE_NAME
desc_en: When you cast a spell gain +1 Magic Damage for the rest of the turn.

name: PASSIVE_SHRAPNEL_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals 2 Magic splash damage.

name: PASSIVE_TWO_NAME
desc_en:
When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 2 spells, gain +1 Bonus Attack.
When you end your turn, if you have exactly 2 mana, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: PASSIVE_ALMSFORTHEPOOR_NAME
desc_en: When you gain coins, all allies heal +1 HP and gain +1 [img:lck].

name: PASSIVE_ANGELICINSPIRATION_NAME
desc_en: When you heal an ally, they also gain +2 mana.

name: PASSIVE_BLESSED_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 to 2 random stats at the start of each turn.

name: PASSIVE_BLESSINGOFHOLYFIRE_NAME
desc_en:
Holy-element spells deal double damage to enemies instead of healing and inflict Burn 2. 
This blessing is lost when you kill a unit.

name: PASSIVE_BLESSINGOFSPIRIT_NAME
desc_en: When you end your turn, you and all allies heal 2 HP and gain 2 mana. This blessing is lost when you cast a spell.

name: PASSIVE_BREATHOFLIFE_NAME
desc_en: When you heal a downed unit, revive it.

name: PASSIVE_CARETAKER_NAME
desc_en: When you heal another unit, heal yourself for half that amount.

name: PASSIVE_ENCHANTEDRELIC_NAME
desc_en: Your trinket's passive and active effects are doubled.

name: PASSIVE_ETERNAL_NAME
desc_en: When you are downed for the 1st time each battle, take no injuries and revive with half HP.

name: PASSIVE_EVILPATRON_NAME
desc_en:
Your healing abilities deal damage to enemies.
Gain +2 range on tile-targeted healing spells.

name: PASSIVE_GODWARRIOR_NAME
desc_en: When you kill an enemy, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: PASSIVE_GODSPEED_NAME
desc_en: When you heal something, gain +2 [img:spd].

name: PASSIVE_HEALINGAURA_NAME
desc_en:
+1 Health Regeneration
Your Health Regeneration also applies to your allies.

name: PASSIVE_HEATHENS_NAME
desc_en: At the start of the battle, inflict Weakness 3 on all enemies.

name: PASSIVE_MORALEBOOST_NAME
desc_en: Allies gain All Stats Up whenever you kill something.

name: PASSIVE_NATURALHEALER_NAME
desc_en: Your heals heal for 2 extra.

name: PASSIVE_PROTECTTHEWEAK_NAME
desc_en: Allies with 5 or fewer HP gain +50% dodge chance.

name: PASSIVE_PURIFIER_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack removes debuffs from allies.

name: PASSIVE_RANGEDMEDIC_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack is a ranged lobbed attack that heals allies and damages enemies.

name: PASSIVE_SHARINGISCARING_NAME
desc_en: When you pick up a non-coin pickup, allies gain the same effects.

name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTNOTCOVET_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy takes damage from an ability, it drops a random pickup.

name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTNOTKILL_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy downs another unit, they take 10 holy damage.

name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTOBEY_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each round, inflict Charm on a random adjacent enemy.

name: PASSIVE_TOPOFF_NAME
desc_en: When you heal another unit over their max HP, you both gain +1 [img:shield].

name: PASSIVE_VENERATEDTOUCH_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 2 on enemies and gives +2 [img:shield] to allies.

name: PASSIVE_BRICKSKIN_NAME
desc_en: Any [img:shield] you gain is increased by 2.

name: PASSIVE_COBRASTYLE_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy moves into an adjacent tile, perform a weak melee attack on it.

name: PASSIVE_COUNTERBARRAGE_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage from an enemy attack, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: PASSIVE_DANCINGLIGHTS_NAME
desc_en: When you switch stances, for each empty armor slot, emit a Sparkle. If all slots are empty gain +1 to a random stat.

name: PASSIVE_ENERGYFISTS_NAME
desc_en: Emit a Sparkle when you use your basic attack.

name: PASSIVE_FLOWSTATE_NAME
desc_en: When you deal damage to another unit, gain +1 [img:str] and +2 [img:dex] until the end of the turn.

name: PASSIVE_HARDEN_NAME
desc_en: When you gain [img:shield], also gain temporary Brace 1.

name: PASSIVE_IRONSKINTECHNIQUE_NAME
desc_en: Gain +2 [img:shield] when you land a critical hit. +10% critical chance.

name: PASSIVE_JAGGEDEDGE_NAME
desc_en: When you lose [img:shield], gain +1 Thorns.

name: PASSIVE_JETFISTS_NAME
desc_en: Your melee attacks and abilities blow wind through the tiles they hit.

name: PASSIVE_LONGARMS_NAME
desc_en: +1 Range and +1 Reach.

name: PASSIVE_MINDBREAKER_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Magic Weakness 1.

name: PASSIVE_MIXUP_NAME
desc_en: When you switch stances, your next basic attack this turn is critical.

name: PASSIVE_MONKEYSTYLE_NAME
desc_en: 15% chance to block damage and counter-attack.

name: PASSIVE_PERFECTTECHNIQUE_NAME
desc_en: While in ranged stance, You have +1 Range and +2 Magic Damage. While in melee stance, you have +1 Brace.

name: PASSIVE_RAPIDFLOW_NAME
desc_en: When you switch stances, do a spin attack that hits all adjacent units.

name: PASSIVE_RUNNINGJAB_NAME
desc_en: When you end your movement, automatically use your basic attack if an enemy is in range.

name: PASSIVE_SAFESWITCHING_NAME
desc_en: When you switch stances, gain +2 [img:shield].

name: PASSIVE_SPREADTHEPAIN_NAME
desc_en: Deal 2 extra damage the first time you damage each unit each turn.

name: PASSIVE_TENDERIZE_NAME
desc_en: Your basic melee attacks inflict Bruise 1.

name: PASSIVE_TURNABOUT_NAME
desc_en: Your basic melee attacks inflict Confusion 1 and make units face away from you.

name: PASSIVE_UNBURDENEDMOTION_NAME
desc_en: +1 [img:spd] and +10% dodge chance for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, you can use your movement action an extra time.

name: PASSIVE_UNBURDENEDSTRIKES_NAME
desc_en: +10% critical hit chance and +25% critical hit damage for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, counter-attack whenever you get hit.

name: PASSIVE_UNBURDENEDTHOUGHTS_NAME
desc_en: +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:cha] for each empty armor slot. If all of your armor slots are empty, your spells cost 1 less mana.

name: PASSIVE_UNSTOPPABLE_NAME
desc_en: You're immune to knockback, Stun, Slow, and other mobility debuffs.

name: PASSIVE_BEDBUGS_NAME
desc_en: You start battles with 2 beefy leech familiars.

name: PASSIVE_CAMBIONCONCEPTION_NAME
desc_en: When you're downed, spawn a demon kitten familiar.

name: PASSIVE_CHAINSOFGUILT_NAME
desc_en: When an enemy downs you and it wasn't a boss, it joins your party permanently.

name: PASSIVE_CORPSECONNOISSEUR_NAME
desc_en:
Start each battle with 2-3 corpses near you.
When you destroy a corpse, heal 2 HP and spawn a food pickup.

name: PASSIVE_DARKPRIEST_NAME
desc_en: At the start of each battle, if you don't have a weapon, gain a temporary Soul Dagger weapon.

name: PASSIVE_SERVUSMORTEM_NAME
desc_en: Destroy a random non-boss enemy at the start of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_ETERNALHEALTH_NAME
desc_en: Suffer only Jinxed when downed. When your party wins a battle, if you were downed, heal to full.

name: PASSIVE_IMMORTALLEECHES_NAME
desc_en: When a unit you inflicted Leeches on dies or loses its leeches, your next basic attack inflicts that many additional leeches.

name: PASSIVE_INFECTED_NAME
desc_en: When you down a unit, reanimate it with 50% HP.

name: PASSIVE_INFINITEREBIRTH_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each round, if there is a body on the map and you're downed, you respawn on that tile with 1 HP and +10 temporary Speed. If that body was a party member, you spawn with full HP instead.

name: PASSIVE_LASTGRASP_NAME
desc_en:
When you're downed, deal 6 damage to each enemy and heal 6 HP to all allies.
Bonus ability: Seppuku

name: PASSIVE_LEECHMOTHER_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack spawns a leech familiar.

name: PASSIVE_NUMBINGLEECHES_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals 0 damage but its status and hit effects are tripled.

name: PASSIVE_OFFLOADPAIN_NAME
desc_en: When you heal, deal 1 damage to each enemy.

name: PASSIVE_ONEWITHNOTHING_NAME
desc_en: If you end your turn with 0 mana, your Mana Regeneration is doubled.

name: PASSIVE_PARASITIC_NAME
desc_en: When you gain health, spawn a leech familiar.

name: PASSIVE_RELENTLESSDEAD_NAME
desc_en: At the end of each round, spawn a zombie kitten familiar onto a random tile.

name: PASSIVE_SACRIFICIALLAMB_NAME
desc_en: When you're downed, allies gain All Stats Up and take an extra turn.

name: PASSIVE_SOULBOND_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link.

name: PASSIVE_SPREADSORROW_NAME
desc_en: When you inflict a debuff to an enemy, inflict that same debuff on another random enemy.

name: PASSIVE_SUPERSTITION_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack inflicts -1[img:lck]. 
When a unit damages you, inflict -1[img:lck] on it.

name: PASSIVE_TORPOR_NAME
desc_en: While you're downed, your basic attack is Haunt. Your body gains +6 corpse HP.

name: PASSIVE_UNDEATH_NAME
desc_en: When you're downed, reanimate each ally to 33% HP. (Once per battle.)

name: PASSIVE_VAMPIRISM_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack has lifesteal.

name: PASSIVE_WORMLORD_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, spawn a leech familiar.

name: PASSIVE_BECKON_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack has +4 Knockback.

name: PASSIVE_BLINK_NAME
desc_en: 33% chance to teleport to a random tile when targeted by an enemy.

name: PASSIVE_DRAG_NAME
desc_en: Units that you knockback take 1 damage for each tile they pass through.

name: PASSIVE_ELDRITCHVISAGE_NAME
desc_en: At the start of your turn, inflict Magic Weakness 1 on all enemies in your line of sight.

name: PASSIVE_ENLIGHTENED_NAME
desc_en: While at full mana, the first spell you cast each turn is free.

name: PASSIVE_FLOURISH_NAME
desc_en: Gravity element abilities do not harm allies. Gravity element abilities give a random positive status effect when used on allies. When you inflict a positive status effect, inflict +1 of that status effect.

name: PASSIVE_FLYING_NAME
desc_en:
You have Flying Movement. When you use a Gravity element ability gain +1 [img:spd].
Gravity element spells cost -1 mana.

name: PASSIVE_FULLPOWER_NAME
desc_en: While at full mana, your basic attack deals triple damage and has +3 Knockback.

name: PASSIVE_GLOW_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Blind.

name: PASSIVE_GRAVITYWELL_NAME
desc_en: When a unit is knocked through a tile adjacent to you, stop it and inflict Stun.

name: PASSIVE_MADVISAGE_NAME
desc_en:
All injuries you get are Disfigured.
While at full mana, your basic action inflicts Madness.
While you have 0 or less [img:cha] you can attack an additional time each turn.

name: PASSIVE_MENTALSTORM_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 Charge when you cast a spell.

name: PASSIVE_MINDTEMPEST_NAME
desc_en: After every sixth spell you cast, gain All Stats Up and +1 Magic Damage.

name: PASSIVE_OMNISCIENCE_NAME
desc_en: You can see EVERYTHING. Line of sight restrictions are ignored.

name: PASSIVE_OVERFLOW_NAME
desc_en: While at full mana, gain +2 Brace and Flying Movement. Your mana is uncapped.

name: PASSIVE_POWERUP_NAME
desc_en: When you gain excess mana, gain +1 Magic Damage and +1 [img:int].

name: PASSIVE_PSIONICREPEL_NAME
desc_en: Units that attack or contact you get knocked back 10 tiles.

name: PASSIVE_PSYSMACK_NAME
desc_en: Knockback damage you and your allies deal is doubled.

name: PASSIVE_BRAINGEYSER_NAME
desc_en: When you gain excess mana, emit that many Sparkles.

name: PASSIVE_REALITYSHATTER_NAME
desc_en: Gravity element abilities spawn Floating Glass.

name: PASSIVE_REPRESSEDMEMORIES_NAME
desc_en: When you spend mana, cast a random Psychic spell that costs less than the mana spent.

name: PASSIVE_SOULSHATTER_NAME
desc_en: When you kill a unit, deal 1 damage to all enemies.

name: PASSIVE_TRUESIGHT_NAME
desc_en: You and your allies can't miss enemies within your line of sight.

name: PASSIVE_TWIDDLE_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack deals 0 damage, but you can use it 2 additional times each turn.

name: PASSIVE_WITHER_NAME
desc_en: Gravity element abilities inflict a random negative status effect when used on enemies.

name: PASSIVE_BOUNCER_NAME
desc_en: When an ally takes damage, move 3 tiles toward the source of the damage and attack it if you can.

name: PASSIVE_CATAPULT_NAME
desc_en: You can throw adjacent allies up to 4 tiles on their turns without using their movement action.

name: PASSIVE_CHAINKNOCKBACK_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack gains +1 Knockback.
Units you knockback will Knockback other units.

name: Eye Catchin'
desc_en: taunt while at full health

name: PASSIVE_FOLLOWUP_NAME
desc_en: After you use your basic attack, dash forward as far as you can.

name: PASSIVE_HARDHEAD_NAME
desc_en: You block attacks from the front.

name: PASSIVE_HARDY_NAME
desc_en: Heal to full HP at the start of each battle.

name: PASSIVE_HEAVYHANDED_NAME
desc_en: +2 Knockback Damage.

name: PASSIVE_HOMERUN_NAME
desc_en: Knockback you deal is increased by 10.

name: PASSIVE_MOUNTAINFORM_NAME
desc_en:
Knockback immunity.
Tiles you walk over become dirt and may spawn rocks.

name: PASSIVE_MYLEG_NAME
desc_en:
All injuries you get are Broken Legs.
If you have four broken legs, gain +4 Thorns, Trample, and adjacent allies have Toss as a bonus ability.

name: PASSIVE_PETROCKS_NAME
desc_en:
Rocks you spawn are alive!!
...and have +3 HP. Spawn a rock at the start of the battle.

name: PASSIVE_PLOW_NAME
desc_en: When you knock back a unit, leave a rock where that unit was.

name: PASSIVE_PRIORITYTARGET_NAME
desc_en: Enemies will attack you instead of your allies if they can.

name: PASSIVE_PROTECTIVE_NAME
desc_en: Your allies have Brace 1.

name: PASSIVE_ROCKASPECT_NAME
desc_en: Units that attack or contact you have a 10% chance to get Petrified.

name: PASSIVE_SCABS_NAME
desc_en: Gain +2 Shield when you take damage from an ability.

name: PASSIVE_SHOVINGMATCH_NAME
desc_en:
When you knock a unit into an ally, or knock an ally into an enemy, that ally uses their basic attack on the other unit.
Your basic attack has +1 Knockback.

name: PASSIVE_SLACKOFF_NAME
desc_en: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain 8 HP.

name: PASSIVE_SLOWANDSTEADY_NAME
desc_en: Gain -2 [img:spd] and +1 Range at the end of each turn. If your [img:spd] is 0, you can attack an extra time each turn.

name: PASSIVE_STOIC_NAME
desc_en: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain +2 Bonus Moves.

name: PASSIVE_THORNS_NAME
desc_en: Thorns 2.

name: PASSIVE_THUNDERTHIGHS_NAME
desc_en: Trample.

name: PASSIVE_TOADSTYLE_NAME
desc_en: Your movement action is a jump. Landing on a unit deals damage and displaces it.

name: PASSIVE_WIDELOAD_NAME
desc_en: When an adjacent ally is targeted by an enemy, swap places with the ally.

name: PASSIVE_WRESTLEMANIAC_NAME
desc_en:
Your basic attack becomes Suplex when adjacent to enemies.
You gain the ability Toss.

name: PASSIVE_AFTERIMAGE_NAME
desc_en: When you move, spawn a shadow where you moved from. The shadow mimics your basic action but fades away at the end of your turn.

name: PASSIVE_AGILE_NAME
desc_en: +2 Movement Range. If you move fewer tiles than your full movement range, you can move a 2nd time for the rest of your movement range.

name: PASSIVE_ALPHASTRIKE_NAME
desc_en: Gain an extra turn at the start of the battle.

name: PASSIVE_BACKSTABBER_NAME
desc_en: Your backstabs are always critical.

name: PASSIVE_BOUNTYHUNTER_NAME
desc_en: During your turn, one random enemy has a Bounty.

name: PASSIVE_BURGLE_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack gains you 1 coin when it deals damage.

name: PASSIVE_CRIPPLE_NAME
desc_en: Your critical hits inflict Immobilize and Weakness 2.

name: PASSIVE_CRITICAL_NAME
desc_en: Your critical hits deal +100% more damage. Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever you make a critical hit.

name: PASSIVE_DOUBLETHROW_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack hits twice for half damage.

name: PASSIVE_FLIPACOIN_NAME
desc_en: When you gain a coin, you have a 50% chance to spawn a coin on a random tile and a 50% chance to gain +2 [img:spd] and +2 [img:lck].

name: PASSIVE_GOLDENCLAWS_NAME
desc_en: Gain +1 Damage for each coin you collect.

name: PASSIVE_LONGSTRIDER_NAME
desc_en: +1 movement range.

name: PASSIVE_LOOTHOARDER_NAME
desc_en: Automatically collect all pickups at the end of the battle if you're not downed.

name: PASSIVE_SWIFTLOOTER_NAME
desc_en:
When you collect a coin pickup, refresh your movement action.
1-2 extra coins spawn in each battle.

name: PASSIVE_PENETRATE_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack passes through units and ignores shield. +1 Range.

name: PASSIVE_PINPOINT_NAME
desc_en: Your critical hits inflict Marked.

name: PASSIVE_POISONTIPS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1.

name: PASSIVE_RAZORCLAWS_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 1.

name: PASSIVE_STEALTHED_NAME
desc_en: Start each battle with Stealth.

name: PASSIVE_SHAKEDOWN_NAME
desc_en: Your critical hits spawn a coin and a random pickup.

name: PASSIVE_SHANK_NAME
desc_en: When behind and adjacent to an enemy, your basic attack is a melee attack that hits twice.

name: PASSIVE_SHIV_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack has +2 damage, +25% critical chance, and inflicts Bleed 1 when attacking a unit in melee range.

name: PASSIVE_SWEETSPOT_NAME
desc_en: +1 Range. Your basic attack deals more damage the farther away you are from the target.

name: PASSIVE_SWIFTKILLER_NAME
desc_en: When you kill a unit, refresh your movement action.

name: PASSIVE_WEAKSPOT_NAME
desc_en: Your basic attack ignores shield and inflicts Weakness 1.

name: PASSIVE_ZIP_NAME
desc_en: Your movement action is Shadowstep.

name: PASSIVE_ARMORSPECIALIST_NAME
desc_en: Your equipment passive effects are doubled.

name: PASSIVE_ARMOREDPLATING_NAME
desc_en: Robots you spawn gain the stats and [img:shield] of your equipped armor.

name: PASSIVE_BLACKSMITH_NAME
desc_en: If you have a weapon, your basic attack becomes Hone.

name: PASSIVE_BOOBYTRAP_NAME
desc_en: When an item you have equipped breaks, it explodes!

name: PASSIVE_CONDUCTOR_NAME
desc_en:
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped.
If you are wearing metal, your weapon deals electric damage.

name: PASSIVE_DEMOMAN_NAME
desc_en:
Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less.
+2 Blast Resistance.

name: PASSIVE_DUCTTAPE_NAME
desc_en: Items you craft stay with you between battles, but become cursed.

name: PASSIVE_EMP_NAME
desc_en:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +2 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun.
+2 Blast Resistance.

name: PASSIVE_ENERGIZER_NAME
desc_en: When you cast a spell, your weapon gets +1 Damage.

name: PASSIVE_ESCAPESEQUENCE_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, explode and get launched to a random tile. This explosion doesn't damage you.

name: PASSIVE_FUZZYFEET_NAME
desc_en: When you end your movement, deal 1 Electric Damage to all adjacent units for each tile you moved.

name: PASSIVE_INGENUITY_NAME
desc_en: Pickups give you +1 Tech in addition to their other effects.

name: PASSIVE_ITEMPROXY_NAME
desc_en: You need one fewer piece of equipment to get set bonuses.

name: PASSIVE_ITSALIVE_NAME
desc_en: Hitting a body with electric damage revives it with 1 HP. The revived corpse is charmed and takes an extra turn, then dies.

name: PASSIVE_LIGHTNINGROD_NAME
desc_en:
You have Electric immunity and are conductive.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 1. Gain 1 Tech when you are hit with electric damage.

name: PASSIVE_LIVINGBATTERY_NAME
desc_en: When an adjacent ally spends mana, gain that much mana.

name: PASSIVE_MRMEGA_NAME
desc_en:
Your explosions are larger and deal +3 damage.
+3 Blast Resistance.

name: PASSIVE_NANOBOTS_NAME
desc_en: Gain +2 Diminishing Health Regeneration every time you take damage from an attack or spell.

name: PASSIVE_NAPALM_NAME
desc_en:
Your explosions inflict Burn 3 and light tiles on fire.
+2 Blast Resistance.

name: PASSIVE_REACTIVEARMOR_NAME
desc_en: When you take damage, craft a Tinkerer weapon or armor piece and equip it in an empty slot.

name: PASSIVE_ROBOTARMS_NAME
desc_en: You can use your weapon an additional time each turn.

name: PASSIVE_SCRAPPER_NAME
desc_en:
Find an extra consumable item at the end of each battle.
When you use up a consumable or trinket, equip a new consumable from your inventory if you have any.

name: PASSIVE_SHRAPNEL_TINKERER_NAME
desc_en: When you break an item, gain +1 Thorns.

name: PASSIVE_VERSIONTWO_NAME
desc_en:
Start with 1 Tech.
Your Tech can't drop below 1.

name: PASSIVE_WEAPONPROFICIENCY_NAME
desc_en: Your weapon damage scales with your stats and counts as a basic attack.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Butcher passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Collarless passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Druid passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Fighter passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Hunter passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random passive from any class when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Mage passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Cleric passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Monk passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Necromancer passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Psychic passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Tank passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Thief passive when you lock in your team's collars.

name: PASSIVE_STARTER_PLACEHOLDER_NAME
desc_en: Becomes a random Tinkerer passive when you lock in your team's collars.
